node_2.excerpt: The gopher next made an appearance at Bell Labs , as Bob Flandrena ’ s avatar
node_2.fallbackText: The gopher next made an appearance at Bell Labs, as Bob Flandrena’s avatar in the Bell Labs mail system. Other Renee drawings became avatars for ken, r, rsc, and others. (Of course, Peter Weinberger’s was his own iconic face .)

node_3.excerpt: Perhaps the best way to get a gopher is to catch one in the wild at
node_3.fallbackText: Perhaps the best way to get a gopher is to catch one in the wild at a Go conference. There are two big chances this year: GopherCon (Denver, April 24-26) and dotGo (Paris, October 10).

node_4.excerpt: Around the same time , Renee roughed out a gopher in clay . This inspired a
node_4.fallbackText: Around the same time, Renee roughed out a gopher in clay. This inspired a refined sculpture that became a vinyl figurine made by Kidrobot . The vinyls were first distributed at OSCON 2011.

node_5.excerpt: About 15 years ago — long before the Go project — the gopher first appeared as
node_5.fallbackText: About 15 years ago—long before the Go project—the gopher first appeared as a promotion for the WFMU radio station in New Jersey. Renee French was commissioned to design a T-shirt for an annual fundraiser and out came the gopher.
